title: Mexican Grilled Pork Skewers
description: Tender and flavorful pork skewers marinated in a blend of Mexican spices, perfect for grilling. Serve with your favorite sides and enjoy!
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together brown sugar, malaysian chili flakes, golden honey, salt, and black pepper.
3. Add pork cubes to the marinade and mix until coated. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
4. Thread pork cubes, onions, and garlic onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Brush grill with oil to prevent sticking.
6. Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until pork is cooked through and slightly charred.
7. Brush with lime juice and serve immediately.
